title: What Prions Are
script_summary: Explore the enigmatic world of prions and their potential dangers.

segments.voiceover: Misfolded proteins that can make more misfolded proteins.
These proteins, called prions, are rare but can lead to serious diseases.
They cause neurodegeneration, impacting the brain’s function.
Infections can occur through contaminated food or surgical instruments.
But don’t panic—research is ongoing, and many cases are preventable.
Stay informed about prions and share this video to spread awareness!

full_voiceover: Misfolded proteins that can make more misfolded proteins. These proteins, called prions, are rare but can lead to serious diseases.
